name: Mock Hollandaise Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the mayonnaise and lemon juice in the top of a double boiler.
2. Place over barely simmering water and cook, stirring constantly, for 3 minutes,
or until warm, but not hot.
3. Add the butter and egg yolks. Cook, stirring constantly for 1 minute,
or until the mixture becomes thick enough to coat a spoon.
4. Watch carefully. If the mixture gets too hot, the eggs will curdle.
5. Remove the top of the double boiler from the water and stir in the cayenne pepper
and salt.
Serving Suggestions:
Serve over broccoli, cauliflower, green beans, asparagus, globe artichokes,
poached eggs, and poached or baked fish.
